roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/X:THE PEOPLE FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINTNAMING THE VICTIM WITH INITIALS ONLY/CTORD:THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT SEALED/EMTERM/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO RETURN TO THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPT, ON 06-27-22BEFORENOON TO HAVE THE GPS DEVICE REAFFIXED/X:EFFECTIVE 06-27-22 AT NOON,THE DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO LEAVE HIS HOMEEVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY FROM 9AM TO 5PM TO MEET WITH HIS CASE WORKERS NINA DAVIS AND THERESE CUTINO/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/SA1:SERIRA FARHANGI, SFPD/SAORD/

/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/CTORD: DEFTDANT REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE,/WS/WEAP/CONTD I&A PLEA DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA 05-16-22/TWA/DOP/
